calendar.matters:
Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Dismiss This Action With Prejudice
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S Motion To Vacate Judgment And Dismiss This Action With Prejudice is granted. No opposition filed. The court signs the proposed order submitted by the plaintiff. Plaintiff is commended for its handling of this matter. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
